source: Stata 18 MP, psmatch2 (Leuven & Sianesi 2003), double precision, set seed 12345, n=40

neighbor.cmd: psmatch2 d x1 x2, outcome(y) neighbor(1) logit

kernel_epan_bw0.5.cmd: psmatch2 d x1 x2, outcome(y) kernel kerneltype(epan) bwidth(0.5) logit

radius_cal0.1.cmd: psmatch2 d x1 x2, outcome(y) radius caliper(0.1) logit

se_formula: sqrt(var1/N1 + var0*wtot/N1^2); var1=Var(y|treated on support, ddof=1), var0=Var(y|used controls, ddof=1), wtot=sum(_weight^2 over controls)
notes: NN ATT + SE and radius ATT + SE are machine-exact; kernel (smooth) ATT matches to ~1e-8, bounded by independent logit propensity-score estimation, not the matching algorithm. AI(2006) robust SE (ai option) matches Stata to machine precision (within-group J-NN self-match + the fixed _weight are discrete, so robust to the PS gap).

ai_robust.cmd: psmatch2 d x1 x2, outcome(y) neighbor(1) ai(J) logit
